name: topological-insulator
description: Domain pack for topological insulators: tight-binding H(k), symmetry / Altland-Zirnbauer class, Berry curvature & Chern number, Wilson loops, Z2, edge states, k·p models, phase diagrams. Extends the physics-research core.

interface.shortDescription: Topological band-theory techniques (Chern, Z2, edge states).
interface.longDescription: Domain pack: tight-binding H(k), symmetry / Altland-Zirnbauer class, Berry curvature & Chern number, Wilson loops / Wannier charge centers, Z2 invariants, edge states & bulk-boundary correspondence, k·p effective models, topological phase diagrams. Extends the physics-research core.
defaultPrompt: Build the BHZ model and give me its Chern number.
Check the bulk-boundary correspondence for this tight-binding model.
